findings.rationale: Governance configuration repo — no application code, no secrets, no user input handling. Policy profiles use YAML with no dynamic evaluation. Schema files are static JSON Schema definitions.
CI workflows use pinned action versions. GitHub token scoped to minimum required permissions. No external service credentials stored in repo.
Policy profiles enforce SOC2/PCI-DSS/HIPAA/GDPR compliance postures. Audit trail maintained via run manifests. No PII stored in governance artifacts.
